ksa_text: Knowledge of data administration policies and procedures, including data lifecycle management, access control and security, data retention and archival, compliance documentation, and stewardship responsibilities.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("data lifecycle", "data retention", "archival"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4109); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in DE job postings or cert curricula (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Would a working Data Engineer self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the technical practice is implicit in DE work (domain affinity 0.72, 3 DE signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching underrepresents many legitimate DE competencies.
